name: mul_assoc
statement: theorem mul_assoc [Semigroup α] (a b c : α) : a * b * c = a * (b * c)

name: mul_comm
statement: theorem mul_comm [CommMonoid α] (a b : α) : a * b = b * a

name: inv_mul_cancel
statement: theorem inv_mul_cancel [Group α] (a : α) : a⁻¹ * a = 1

name: mul_inv_cancel
statement: theorem mul_inv_cancel [Group α] (a : α) : a * a⁻¹ = 1

name: map_mul
statement: theorem MonoidHom.map_mul [MulOneClass M] [MulOneClass N] (f : M →* N) (a b : M) : f (a * b) = f a * f b

name: Subgroup.mem_closure
statement: theorem Subgroup.mem_closure {G : Type*} [Group G] {s : Set G} {x : G} (hx : x ∈ s) : x ∈ Subgroup.closure s
